role_title: Senior Associate, DashMart - Growth Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: a few days a month in person together in-office and at team offsites

level_signals: Individual contributor reporting to a Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2-4+ years of experience. You've succeeded in similar cultures that are highly analytical and cross-functional (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and building models in excel.
Build models using Excel and SQL to evaluate the economic, operational and strategic costs and benefits of various programs and experiments
You solve problems from first principles. You have a talent for synthesizing complex problems, can translate high-level goals into actionable plans, and enjoy implementing a process

You're energized by AI tools — and you actively experiment with them. You don't wait to be told how to use a new tool; you've already tried it. You bring a builder's mindset to AI: using it to automate the repetitive, accelerate the analytical, and unlock work that would otherwise require a larger team.
You'll partner with and influence cross-functional teams including growth, quality, design, marketing, partnerships and product team to build and scale the Grocery business.
You are an owner. You're always looking for opportunities to better your work product and own the outcome – both the good and the bad.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environment
You have a completed Bachelor's Degree ideally in business management, economics, finance, marketing or a related Business field.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Big plus if your experience has consumer growth oriented scope - think occasions strategy, pricing, promotions, in-app experience, etc.

scope.surface: DashMart (first-party grocery/convenience/essentials delivery); growth initiatives across platform
scope.business_model: first-party on-demand delivery (B2C), part of DoorDash's New Verticals
primary_metrics_inferred: Week-over-week operational metrics via tracking dashboards
core_responsibilities: Develop optimal strategy for serving customers and categories from first principles
Own tracking dashboards and manage week-over-week metrics
Build models using Excel and SQL to evaluate programs and experiments
Transform strategies into operational experiments with measurable outcomes
Use AI tools to rapidly prototype consumer-facing ideas, create mocks, synthesize qualitative feedback, and develop product visions
Lead cross-functional initiatives with growth, quality, design, marketing, partnerships and product teams

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($87K-$128K base nationally)
Clear reporting structure (individual contributor reporting to a Manager)
Hybrid model described as low-burden (a few days a month in-person)
Role explicitly embraces evolving AI scope as an opportunity
red_flags: Pay range is wide ($41K spread) and localized — actual local range not disclosed
Location cities not specified despite being a hybrid role
Years of experience framed as '2-4+' which is ambiguous (both lower and upper bounds are soft)

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', years range, comp, and IC reporting line)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false from hybrid description; not explicitly stated)
ambiguities: Years of experience stated as '2-4+' — the '+' after 4 suggests the upper bound is open-ended, making this potentially a wider range than a typical 2-4 year bracket. Treated as min=2, max=4 with soft upper ceiling.

Bachelor's degree listed under 'We're excited about you because...' section with the word 'ideally' qualifying the field of study, but the degree itself is stated as a completed requirement without 'ideally'. Classified as hard based on unconditional phrasing of 'You have a completed Bachelor's Degree'.
Hybrid model mentioned but no specific city or office location tied to this role is named; cities_listed left empty.
